Package kp.collections.preferable

Class Preferable

java.lang.Object
kp.collections.preferable.Preferable
public class Preferable extends Object
The normally preferable coding practices for the collections.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    preferArrayDeque()
    The faster ArrayDeque should be preferred.
    The faster ConcurrentLinkedDeque should be preferred.
    static void
    preferConcurrentHashMap()
    The ConcurrentHashMap should be preferred.
    static void
    preferConcurrentSkipListMapAndConcurrentSkipListSet()
    The ConcurrentSkipListMap should be preferred.
    The ConcurrentSkipListSet should be preferred.
    static void
    preferCopyOnWriteArrayList()
    The CopyOnWriteArrayList should be preferred.
    static void
    preferLinkedHashMapAndLinkedHashSet()
    The ordered LinkedHashMap should be preferred.
    The ordered LinkedHashSet should be preferred.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • preferArrayDeque

      public static void preferArrayDeque()
      The faster ArrayDeque should be preferred.
      The faster ConcurrentLinkedDeque should be preferred.

      Speed

    • preferLinkedHashMapAndLinkedHashSet

      public static void preferLinkedHashMapAndLinkedHashSet()
      The ordered LinkedHashMap should be preferred.
      The ordered LinkedHashSet should be preferred.

      Ordering

    • preferCopyOnWriteArrayList

      public static void preferCopyOnWriteArrayList()
      The CopyOnWriteArrayList should be preferred.

      Synchronization

    • preferConcurrentHashMap

      public static void preferConcurrentHashMap()
      The ConcurrentHashMap should be preferred.

      Synchronization

    • preferConcurrentSkipListMapAndConcurrentSkipListSet

      public static void preferConcurrentSkipListMapAndConcurrentSkipListSet()
      The ConcurrentSkipListMap should be preferred.
      The ConcurrentSkipListSet should be preferred.
